positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a soaring mountain hawk in mid-flight, silhouetted against a gradient sunset sky. The hawk should be depicted with elegant, sharp feather details and outstretched wings in a strong, centralized composition. Style is modern, graphic, and high-contrast, suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Color palette limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, and crisp white. The background should feature stylized, abstract mountain ranges and wispy clouds, maintaining negative space around the main subject. Clean lines, vector aesthetic, highly detailed.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, low resolution, grainy, cartoon, photorealistic, messy, dirty, out of frame
